name: Rifleman
description: Patience is a weapon. The Rifleman operates at maximum range, choosing their moment with methodical care and eliminating targets before the enemy knows anyone's aiming. Lower HP than the front-line classes, but if anything gets close enough to matter, the Rifleman has already made a mistake.

abilities.name: Aimed Shot
abilities.description: A single carefully placed round. Everything the Rifleman does is built around this: patience, stillness, one clean shot.

abilities.name: Rapid Fire
abilities.description: Three rounds in fast succession â€” accuracy drops, but against anything within twenty meters, it doesn't matter.

abilities.name: Incendiary Round
abilities.description: A thermite-tipped round. The initial impact is significant; what comes after is worse.

abilities.name: Suppression Shot
abilities.description: A round placed specifically to restrict enemy movement â€” not necessarily to wound. The Rifleman's tactical round.
